summaries.geminiAnalysis: The baseline and staged images are visually identical. There are no changes to the permanent architectural envelope between the two images. Specifically, the front wall appears as a single, continuous wall plane in both the baseline and staged images, with no evidence of it being split into two wall planes. The deterministic findings describe changes that are not visually apparent in the provided images.
